November 2022

Brawl Stars Project

Personal Coding

I designed code to help optimize Brawl Stars gameplay through club level statistics and infographics.

  • Check out the REPO!
January - April 2019

Code in the Community

Volunteer Tutor

I am excited to volunteer at CITC where we will be teaching underprivileged kids basic coding skills!

August 2017 - August 2019

NUS CAPTs_Lock

Interest Group

I am part of a committee in CAPTs_Lock, which teaches basic programming skills to students of College of Alice and Peter Tan, aiming to promote technological awareness.

January - April, 2018

Deaf Lightsabering

Community Engagement Fest

I participated in the annual CE Fest as a Facilitator for the trail Lightsabering with the Deaf. Leading up to the trail, I attended lessons for basic sign language. It was an amazing experience that taught me many things.

July 23 - 27, 2018

Freshmen Orientation

College of Alice & Peter Tan

I participated in the annual FOC for CAPT as an Orientation Group Counsellor, and was in the Orientation Group NOVA in the House Phoenix!

July 28 - 31, 2018

Orientation Week

School of Computing

I participated in the annual FOW for SOC as an Orientation Group Leader, and was in the Orientation Group GAMORA in the House Venus!
